nodes.label: Quickstart — Skill Map Canvas (non-obvious rules)
nodes.rationale: Codifies eight gotchas: sticky ports never auto-reroute, ortho bend axis locked at mousedown from the stable segment descriptor, segOverrides[i] is a scalar, undo snapshots at action boundaries capped at 80, empty state means no server row (never re-seed), edit-mode mousedown must not start a drag, delete cascades edges, endpoint drop on empty space reverts.
